data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding mode flags.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for mode flags (off, monitor, enforced) but did not provide any concrete evidence or data to confirm their existence or functionality. The prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to these mode flags, leading to an inconclusive result. Without specific evidence of the mode flags being implemented or checked, the requirement cannot be deemed satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of mode flags (off, monitor, enforced) being validated or checked.
